summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SynthOps IT Operations Portal. CRITICAL BUG FIX: Resolved SelectItem empty value error in Tasks, Projects, Incidents, and TimeTracking pages that was causing app crashes. Both backend (100% pass - 22/22) and frontend (100% - 9/9 pages) working correctly.

minor.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby warnings in console

issues: Missing aria-describedby attributes - console warnings only, no user impact

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: SelectItem value='' causing 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string' error
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed empty string values to 'none' and updated submit handlers to convert 'none' back to null

passed_tests: Clients page - list, create, edit (FIX VERIFIED - no more crash)
Clients error handling - displays readable error messages
Tasks page - list, kanban view, create task (FIX VERIFIED)
Time Tracking page - list and create time entries
Form validation error messages display correctly
action_items: OPTIONAL: Add aria-describedby to DialogContent components to remove console warnings
critical_code_review_comments: Previous critical bug with 'Objects are not valid as a React child' error is FIXED
SelectItem empty value issue across 4 files is FIXED
getErrorMessage utility correctly handles Pydantic validation errors
seed_data_creation: Created test data during pytest execution (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major bugs from iteration 1 have been fixed. The Clients page crash and SelectItem errors are resolved. Backend APIs are fully functional. Console shows DialogContent aria warnings but these don't affect functionality.

issue_1.name: Objects are not valid as a React child error
issue_1.root_cause: Pydantic validation errors returned as array objects were being rendered directly in toast messages
issue_1.fix: Added getErrorMessage utility in /app/frontend/src/lib/errorHandler.js that converts error arrays to readable strings

issue_2.name: SelectItem empty value crash
issue_2.root_cause: Radix UI Select component requires non-empty string values for SelectItem, but several forms used value=''
issue_2.fix: Changed value='' to value='none' and updated handleSubmit to convert 'none' back to null before API calls
